passage.title: A Day with Must Have
passage.text: He must have worked very hard. He must have been tired. They must have made a mistake. She must have told the truth. We must have been late. He must have read this book. She must have been very happy. They must have spent a lot of money. He must have called me. She must have gone there.
passage.hindiTranslation: उसने जरूर बहुत मेहनत की होगी। वह जरूर थका हुआ होगा। उन्होंने जरूर गलती की होगी। उसने जरूर सच बोला होगा। हमने जरूर देर कर दी होगी। उसने जरूर यह किताब पढ़ी होगी। वह जरूर बहुत खुश हुई होगी। उन्होंने जरूर बहुत पैसे खर्च किए होंगे। उसने जरूर मुझे फोन किया होगा। वह जरूर वहाँ गई होगी।

options: They must have spent a lot of money.
She must have been sad.
He must have been tired.

comprehensionQuestions.answer: He must have worked very hard.
